name: Meat Ball Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the seasonings with the minced pork.
2. Add the chopped onion and brown it in the fat.
3. Work the mixture with your hands to ensure the seasonings are well distributed.
4. Use your imagination with spices and remember that no single spice should predominate.
5. Shape the meat into 1 1/2 inch balls and lightly dust them with flour.
6. Drop the meatballs into 3 pints of boiling water and cook slowly for 1 1/2 hours.
7. At the end of cooking, thicken the stock by adding 1/2 cup of browned flour directly to the boiling stock without mixing it into a paste.
8. The stock will jell when cooled, and your ragout de boulettes will keep for some time.
